#include <stdio.h> #include <stdlib.h> void push(); void pop(); void display(); int stack[100], n, top = -1, ch; int main()  {     printf("Enter stack size: ");     scanf("%d", &n);     printf("\nStack Operations:");     printf("\n1. Push\n2. Pop\n3. Display\n4. Exit\n");     do     {         printf("\nEnter your choice: ");         scanf("%d", &ch);         switch(ch)         {             case 1:                 push();                 break;             case 2:                 pop();                 break;             case 3:                 display();                 break;             case 4:                 printf("\nExiting from the stack...\n");                 break;             default:                 printf("\nInvalid choice!\n");         }     } while(ch != 4);     return 0; } void push() {     int x;     if(top == n - 1)     {         printf("\nStack is full!\n");     }     else     {         printf("Enter element: ");         scanf("%d", &x);         top++;         stack[top] = x;         printf("Element inserted successfully.\n");     } } void pop() {     if(top == -1)     {         printf("\nStack is empty!\n");     }     else     {         printf("Deleted element is: %d\n", stack[top]);         top--;     } } void display() {     int i;     if(top == -1)     {         printf("\nStack is empty!\n");     }     else     {         printf("\nStack elements are:\n");         for(i = top; i >= 0; i--)         {             printf("%d\n", stack[i]);         }     } }                   sackarray

Hello, Gaining access to the IIT ecosystem is a rare privilege. This summer, experience it with HIMSHIKHAR 2026, a 2-month residential program at IIT Mandi. You will live on campus, learn from IIT Professors, build capstone projects, and collaborate with India's sharpest minds. Eligibility is open to all students & professionals (tech and non-tech). Whether your goal is AI/ML, Entrepreneurship, or accelerating your tech career, this residency provides the practical foundation and elite network to make it happen. Reply "Summer at IIT Mandi" to get your test booking link immediately. As a true on-campus experience, capacity is dictated by physical infrastructure - hostel rooms and faculty bandwidth. To secure your limited-seat place in the Himalayas, you must clear the entrance test.  Please ensure this is completed before the deadline.

import pandas as pd from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import CountVectorizer from sklearn.naive_bayes import MultinomialNB # Create dataset data = pd.DataFrame({ "text": [ "Payment not processed", "Unable to login", "Need help with pricing", "App crashing", "Refund not received" ], "category": ["Billing", "Technical", "General", "Technical", "Billing"], "priority": ["High", "High", "Low", "High", "High"] }) # Convert text to numbers vectorizer = CountVectorizer() X = vectorizer.fit_transform(data["text"]) # Train models model_cat = MultinomialNB() model_cat.fit(X, data["category"]) model_pri = MultinomialNB() model_pri.fit(X, data["priority"]) # Test input new_ticket = ["Payment failed"] new_X =…

# Resume Screening and Ranking System ## Project Overview This project builds a machine learning-based system to automatically screen and rank resumes based on a given job role. It analyzes resume content, matches skills with job requirements, and ranks candidates based on their relevance. --- ## Objective To develop an intelligent system that helps recruiters quickly identify suitable candidates by comparing resumes with job descriptions. --- ## Tools & Technologies
  • Python
  • Scikit-learn
  • Google Colab
--- ## Features
  • Resume text analysis and processing
  • Skill matching with job description
  • Candidate ranking using similarity scores
  • Identification of missing skills
  • Automated resume screening
--- ## Methodology
  • T
…
